title: Anthropic Opus 4.7: coding gains, cyber limits — Apr 16
summary: Anthropic ships Claude Opus 4.7 with major coding improvements but deliberately scales back cyber capabilities. OpenAI expands Codex into an always-on agent that watches your screen. UK launches a £500 million sovereign AI fund with seven startups in the first batch.
